data.body:
Goal:
Add command-line support for setting scope metadata during `kno new` and `kno update`, matching the prompt-run-ledger scope field names and validation rules.

Verification:
1. Run `kno -C ~/knots new "scope smoke" --scope-volume 5 --scope-scale fib_v1 --scope-reliability 62` and confirm the created knot stores those values.
2. Run `kno -C ~/knots update <id> --scope-volume 8 --scope-scale fib_v1 --scope-volume-score-confidence 0.72 --scope-reliability 44` and confirm the update is stored.
3. Run `kno -C ~/knots show <id>` and confirm the final scope values are visible.
4. Run `cargo test` from ~/knots.

Constraints:
Validate `scope_volume` as a positive integer and `scope_reliability` as a 0-100 integer. Keep quorum confidence fields as 0.0-1.0 floats and stddev fields as non-negative floats.
data.title: Add CLI scope flags
